title: Moodu Panikkul Lyrics Thirudan Police Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song : Moodu Panikkul
Movie: Thirudan Police
Music: Yuvan Sankar Raja
Singers: Naresh Iyer, Roshini
Lyrics: Na.Muthukumar

Moodu Panikkul
Oodi Thiriyum
Meagam Pola Mayakka Nilai.

Inaidha Rendum Seradhu
Searndha Rendum Inayadhu
kanavu varum urangadhu

Moodu Panikkul
Oodi Thiriyum
Meagam Pola Mayakka Nilai..

Maayai Pola
Yaavum Thondrum
Maari Pogum Manam Muzhudhum

Poga Poga
Kai Thodaamal
Dhooram pogum Muzhu Pozhuthum

Vali Theriyum Puriyadhu
Pagal Irundhum Vidiyadhu
Intha Mayakkam Theliyadhu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Moodu Panikkul'?

The song 'Moodu Panikkul' conveys the feelings of love and connection, portraying a romantic relationship filled with dreams and aspirations.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Thirudan Police'?

Thirudan Police is a comedy-action film that revolves around a thief who gets entangled in various humorous situations, with this song highlighting the romantic angle of the story.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented singers Naresh Iyer and Roshini, with music composed by Yuvan Sankar Raja.

When was 'Moodu Panikkul' released?

'Moodu Panikkul' was released on July 12, 2014, as part of the movie Thirudan Police.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the vibrant world of Thirudan Police, the song Moodu Panikkul serves as a beautiful expression of love and connection. It encapsulates the joy and excitement of romance, with lyrics that evoke dreams and aspirations shared between lovers. The melodious voices of Naresh Iyer and Roshini, combined with Yuvan's captivating music, create an uplifting atmosphere. This song perfectly complements the light-hearted and comedic tone of the film, making it a memorable highlight.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Moodu Panikkul from Thirudan Police is a delightful duet that captures the essence of romance and joy. With the enchanting voices of Naresh Iyer and Roshini, paired with Yuvan's vibrant composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the melodious world where love dances to the rhythm of life!
stanzaMeanings: The mood is like a cloud that floats and creates an enchanting state.
Searching and finding a sweet bond that comes close.
When two things come together, a dream will arise from their union.
Searching and finding a sweet bond that comes close.
Everything will change like magic, and the heart will feel it all.
As we go, without touching, everything will move far away.
The pain is unknown, whether it is day or night; this enchantment is unclear.
As we go slowly, like water flowing, what will happen to the worries?
In my heart, what waves are there? There are no feelings, only struggles.
By falling, we rise; by rising, we write. We must think about everything.
